payload.answer: I can remember the URL and your stated reason, but I cannot extract article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL is explicit, but the article contents were unavailable due to the 404 network error; only the user-stated reason and fetch failure can be stored.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it is useful for memory architecture.
Fetching https://example.com/missing failed with a 404 network error in the provided mock fetch result.

details: Stored the article URL as a source reference.
Stored the user-stated reason: useful for memory architecture.
Did not store any article claims because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or archived copy.
